title: Looking for Category Manager at StayVista

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at StayVista
jsonLd.description:
StayVista invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StayVista:
StayVista is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
